{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/void.png
}}

Void blocks are creative-only blocks used for building blueprints for SBB structures.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Colored Blocks]]
[[Category:Creative Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
